ae_notes: Client complained about the new UI. I offered a 50% discount for the next 6 months to match the competitor's price and keep them from canceling. Followed standard retention policy.
Usage metrics are down 30%. Instead of a price cut, I hosted a 'Clinical Efficiency Workshop' to show the team how to use the automated reporting feature. They were very impressed.
The procurement lead mentioned budget cuts. I provided a 'Value Realization Audit' showing they saved $20k in shipping costs last year. No discount was needed after they saw the data.
Secondary attempt to save the account after the initial discount period ended. Customer still feels the platform is too complex. Offered more training but they decided to move to a simpler tool.
Customer requested a feature that is only in the Gold tier. I gave them a 30-day trial of the Gold features to prove the ROI before the renewal date.
Conducted a Strategic Advisory Workshop to solve platform complexity friction. Successfully pivoted from a price-based retention request to a value-based automation roadmap. Renewal secured.
